title: `pyexpat.ErrorString` segfaults
author: devdanzin
body:
It's possible to segfault PyPy by calling `pyexpat.ErrorString` with an invalid value:

```python
import pyexpat
pyexpat.ErrorString(-10)
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
```

```
Python 3.10.14 (39dc8d3c85a7, Aug 27 2024, 14:32:27)
[PyPy 7.3.17 with GCC 10.2.1 20210130 (Red Hat 10.2.1-11)] on linux
```

Found using fusil by @vstinner.
